default_rubric: Score this AI response 0-100 on these criteria: Accuracy (30pts) - factually correct, no hallucinations; Completeness (25pts) - all parts of the task addressed; Quality (25pts) - well-structured, clear, professional; Usefulness (20pts) - practically useful output. Return only a JSON object: {"score": <0-100>, "breakdown": {"accuracy": <0-30>, "completeness": <0-25>, "quality": <0-25>, "usefulness": <0-20>}, "notes": "brief explanation"}
pipeline_rubric: Score this 4-stage pipeline output 0-100. Evaluate: Stage Quality (40pts - each stage output is high quality); Pipeline Coherence (30pts - each stage builds properly on the previous); Final Output Quality (30pts - the communicate stage output is excellent and standalone-useful). Return JSON: {"score": <0-100>, "breakdown": {"stage_quality": <0-40>, "coherence": <0-30>, "final_output": <0-30>}, "notes": "brief explanation"}
